title: Senior Event Manager
description:
Senior Event Manager 

I’m partnering with an award-winning boutique event agency with a strong presence across Asia. They work with international MNC clients on high-quality internal and external events and are known for their collaborative culture, strong client relationships and delivery excellence.

They’re now looking to hire a Senior Event Manager to lead event operations, manage a team, and ensure consistent, commercially sound delivery across the business. This is a full-time, Singapore-based role.

Key responsibilities

  • Lead and develop project teams, overseeing resourcing, performance and delivery standards

  • Own end-to-end operational delivery of events, from planning through on-site execution and post-event review

  • Ensure projects are delivered on time, on budget and to brief, in line with internal SOPs

  • Drive operational efficiency, quality control and profitability across projects

  • Act as senior client contact, providing operational leadership and strategic counsel

  • Lead pitch preparation and support new business initiatives

  • Manage budgets, timelines, suppliers and project documentation

  • Anticipate and resolve delivery, resourcing and stakeholder challenges

  • Build and maintain strong supplier, freelancer and venue networks

Experience required

  • 7+ years’ experience in event management or event marketing, ideally agency-side

  • Proven team leadership experience (or clear readiness to step into a senior leadership role)

  • Strong commercial and budget management capability

  • Strategic, organised and confident managing multiple projects simultaneously

  • A collaborative, direct and empathetic leadership style

  • Willingness to travel as required

The opportunity

This role offers genuine influence within a close-knit agency environment, combining strategic leadership with hands-on event delivery across Asia.

If you tick these boxes, look no further and apply now! You can email our specialist, Laura Denholm, directly at laurad@weareaspire.com or simply click the "Apply Now" button today.

EA License No: R22108421
Agency License No: 11C4388

postedCompany.description:
Aspire specialises in recruiting for the media and marketing communications industry. We help change people's lives and improve business performance.

We have a 96% success rate of placing the right people into the right role. We act as both a brand embassador for our employer customers, and a trusted recruitment partner for our candidates. We are a 'high touch' consultancy who believes in meeting face to face in order to fully understand your requirements, whether it is hiring new staff or looking for the next career move.

Established since 1992, Aspire has over two decades of heritage in our specialist areas, so our dedicated consltas are well positioned to help.

Aspire has developed an international presence with offices in Singapore, Hong Kong, London and Manchester for employers and individuals with global aspirations. Aspire has been operating in Asia since November 2011, facilitating the movement of talent, locally, regionally and at a global level. Aspire is also ISO 9001 accredited, an investors in People Gold Award Company, a Sunday Times Top 100 company to work, members of APSCo Asia and we are always interested in talking to media & marketing communications professionals as well as those who are considering a career in recruitment with us at Aspire.
